title: Modifier keys not recognized correctly in src/input/keyboard.rs
body: Holding Alt or Ctrl while typing in a text field inside carbonyl sends the wrong key codes to the underlying Chromium instance, breaking common shortcuts like Ctrl+L in the address bar equivalents used by web apps.

title: build.sh doesn't document CARBONYL_SKIP_CARGO_BUILD for gclient-only rebuilds
body: scripts/build.sh checks CARBONYL_SKIP_CARGO_BUILD to skip the cargo build step, which is handy when only Chromium sources changed, but this isn't mentioned anywhere in the script comments or docs, so contributors keep rebuilding the Rust side unnecessarily.

title: True color mode ignored in some terminal emulators
body: Renderer::enable_true_color forwards set_true_color(true) to the painter, but on a couple of terminals that advertise truecolor via COLORTERM the output still looks quantized, suggesting the renderer isn't checking COLORTERM before falling back.

title: KD-tree rebuild is a bottleneck on complex pages
body: Profiling a heavy page with lots of overlapping quads shows most of the frame time going into rebuilding the KD-tree in src/output/kd_tree.rs on every frame, rather than incrementally updating it.

title: DCS parser silently drops malformed escape sequences
body: src/input/dcs/parser.rs seems to just return early when it encounters a sequence it doesn't recognize instead of logging anything, which makes debugging terminal input compatibility issues across different terminal emulators very hard.
